company_name: UC San Diego School of Medicine
suggested_title: Sriram Ambadi - MD Candidate (Class of 2029) at UC San Diego School of Medicine
prospect_notes: Sriram Ambadi graduated from Emory University in 2025 (Class of 2025) with a degree in Anthropology and Human Biology. He was named to Emory's 100 Senior Honorary — a distinction for outstanding emerging alumni leaders — and the Dean's List. He also earned the Gold President's Volunteer Service Award for 270+ hours with BreakTheOutbreak. He is now a first-year medical student (Class of 2029) at UC San Diego School of Medicine, where he has been featured in a UCSD photo essay on compassionate medicine, discussing his service-oriented philosophy. His path reflects a strong commitment to health equity and patient-centered care rooted in his Emory undergraduate experience.

suggested_title: Annie Shen - MD Candidate (Class of 2027) at Vanderbilt University School of Medicine
prospect_notes: Annie Shen grew up in Richland, WA and graduated from Emory University with a double major in Chemistry and Anthropology and Human Biology. After graduating, she spent a gap year at the NIH conducting immunology research before matriculating to Vanderbilt University School of Medicine. She is currently a second-year medical student (VMS2, Class of 2027) and is involved in VUSM Ambassadors, Wilderness Medicine, Shade Tree Clinic, Association of Women's Surgeons, and SMC mentorship. She serves on the student planning team for Vanderbilt's Second Look Weekend, helping admitted students evaluate the school. Her combination of basic science research at NIH and dual STEM and social science majors at Emory reflects a strong physician-scientist trajectory.

company_name: Mayo Clinic Alix School of Medicine
suggested_title: Carolyn Zhou - MD Candidate at Mayo Clinic Alix School of Medicine
prospect_notes: Carolyn Zhou is an Emory University alumna who is now a medical student at Mayo Clinic Alix School of Medicine, one of the most selective medical schools in the United States with a 2.1% acceptance rate. Her Instagram bio confirms she is an Emory alum attending Mayo Clinic School of Medicine. Prior to medical school she worked in clinical settings including radiology assistance and COVID-19 testing at Planned Parenthood Arizona, developing hands-on patient care experience. Mayo Clinic Alix School of Medicine is known for its research-oriented curriculum and early patient contact. Carolyn's acceptance to one of the nation's most selective medical programs reflects her strong academic and clinical record from Emory.
